title: Crunchy Mexican Poblano Crumble
description: This adventurous mexican dish features sweet red peppers braised in a savory sauce with fermented spices for an egg-free-friendly option.

ingredients.name: 2 poblano peppers
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are fully cooked and slightly softened before use

ingredients.name: 1 small onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely for added depth of flavor

ingredients.name: 4 cloves garlic
ingredients.notes: Minced or lightly smashed for a nice texture

ingredients.name: 2 cups heavy cream
ingredients.notes: Heated and reduced to thicken the sauce

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse and pat dry poblano peppers. Score each with a knife in several places.
Sauté onions, garlic, and cayenne pepper in heavy cream until softened and slightly caramelized.
Add chopped poblano peppers along with smoked paprika and lime juice; simmer for 10 minutes.
Season to taste with salt. Let the mixture cool before dividing into small crumbles to serve.
Serve hot as a topping for toast, eggs, or any other savory dish.
